description:
In 2025 AD, after a sudden invasion of intergalactic kaiju, a painfully shy boy, Tetsuo Yabusame, saves the autonomous bomb Yukio and becomes an unlikely defender of Earth. Ten years later, now hailed as a "savior", Tetsuo heads into space with Yukio for the Final Battle. With 20,000 kaiju closing in, humanity’s fate is on the line to bring an end to this relentless conflict!
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: The Savior Who Could Not Bring Salvation
